text:
Once there was an old turtle named Tommy. Everything seemed nice and peaceful in his forest home. That is until one sunny morning. A fox saw Tommy playing.

"Why did you choose that stupid shell?"

Tommy didn't speak. He felt silly. But then he thought. Maybe it has charm.

"Why mine?"

That fox laughed wickedly.

"I think I have lots. I just didn't know."

One day Tommy found. A thing. A hat.

"Just because you think it pretty."

So now Tommy wore it. He felt nice. People liked.

One turtle said.

"Why don't you wear tails?"

He thought. Maybe I look silly.

They loved him anyway.

So he stayed cheerful. Everyone liked him.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
